description.value:
Baseline (2 Spirituality): As an action, weave a 30-foot distortion field around your route logic for 10 minutes (concentration). Hostile attempts to track, predict, divine, or intuit your immediate movement within the field suffer -1d4. The first time each round a creature in the field attempts to gain advantage from foresight/divination effects against you or your chosen allies, that advantage is canceled.

Limits: Interference does not block direct line-of-sight observation or true-name authority effects from higher-sequence entities.

Higher Spend (upcast):

  • +1 Spirituality: Radius becomes 60 feet and penalty becomes -1d6.
  • +2 Spirituality: Choose up to three allies in the field; each can force one hostile tracking/divination roll against them to reroll before the effect ends.
  • +4 Spirituality: When a hostile prediction effect still succeeds in the field, you immediately learn the rough direction of the source and may move up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

Corruption Hook: If Interference is used to conceal a deliberate betrayal of sworn truth, gain 1 Corruption.

Legacy Upgrade (Sequence 6 - Scope)

At Sequence 6, Interference can be threaded through adjacent lanes. If Interference is cast with at least +2 Spirituality, you may anchor one secondary 20-foot pocket within 60 feet of the main field. The pocket inherits baseline anti-tracking pressure. Once per short rest, you may create this secondary pocket without increasing Spirituality cost.
